hook: If someone resists every practical next step, that resistance may be the signal.
body: Not every hesitation is bad, but repeated avoidance often tells you more than the words around it.

hook: Men sometimes keep negotiating access long after the other person has shown no real intention to advance the connection.
body: Treat ongoing avoidance as useful data rather than a puzzle you must solve.

hook: Treat ongoing avoidance as useful data rather than a puzzle you must solve.
body: A person who always says maybe later to texting, planning, or meeting may be giving you the answer indirectly.

body: If the next step keeps getting deferred, stop pushing and let the pattern speak for itself.
